shelfmark: PUL Islamic Manuscripts, Third Series no. 584e.4 (Michaelides 4)
description: Legal document (iqrār) mentioning ʻAlāʾ al-Dīn ibn Ḥasan, dated 15 Dhū al-Ḥijjah 800 H. [1398]. [Described on the paper wrapper as : "The prince Shahab el Dine Ahmed ibn Zen al dine Received [...] the amount of the mariage from the prince Al el Dine Aly ibn Hassan Fatima el Togun"].
description_he: מסמך משפטי (אקראר) המזכיר עלאא אל-דין אבן חסן, תאריך 15 ד'ו אל-חג'ה 800 להגירה [1398].
